essential_assertions.text: assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, true, false, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, false, true, true);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, false, true, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, true, false, true);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, false, false, true) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, true, true, false);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, false, false, true) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, true, true, false);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, false, true, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, true, false, true);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, true, false, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, false, true, true);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, false, false, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, true, true, true);
